GET /api/proxy/real-debrid with query parameters should forward them
Proxy should handle empty responses correctly

Proxy should handle non-JSON responses
Proxy should handle malformed Real-Debrid paths gracefully

Search with query parameters should handle maxResults filter

stdout.text: Warning: maxResults=5 returned 20 results. This suggests the YTS module may not implement result limiting.
